annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under RCW 4.56.110 (amended 2019): judgments on a written contract carry the contract’s rate; tort judgments and the general catch-all carry a rate tied to the federal prime rate (Fed H.15) — currently about 8.75%. Simple interest. Verify the current rate at app.leg.wa.gov and the Fed H.15 prime; not legal advice.
